indices.name: S&P 500
indices.original_text: The main stock market index of United States, the US500, fell to 6939 points on January 30, 2026, losing 0.43% from the previous session. Over the past month, the index has climbed 1.37% and is up 14.87% compared to the same time last year. Historically, the United States Stock Market Index reached an all time high of 7002.58 in January of 2026.

indices.name: KOSPI
indices.surge_analysis: 반도체 주도 랠리로 사상 최고치 경신. 삼성전자(+1.24%), SK하이닉스(+6.39%) 급등. AI 수요 지속 및 Q4 실적 호조로 반도체 섹터 강세. 다만 트럼프 대통령의 한국 자동차 관세 25% 인상 위협으로 자동차/제조업 섹터 선별적 차익실현.
indices.original_text: The benchmark KOSPI rose 0.06% to close at 5,224 on Friday, extending its rally to reach a fresh record high, as semiconductor stocks lifted the index on renewed confidence in the chip cycle. Investors piled into heavyweight chipmakers following strong Q4 earnings and persistent AI-driven demand, reinforcing expectations of sustained growth in advanced memory products. Over the past month, the index has climbed 21.23% and is up 107.53% compared to the same time last year.

indices.name: NASDAQ
indices.original_text: NASDAQ Composite Index 2026-01-27: 23,817.100. The NASDAQ Composite Index is a market capitalization weighted index with more than 3000 common equities listed on the NASDAQ Stock Market.

indices.name: USD/KRW
indices.original_text: The exchange rate for US dollar to South Korean wons is currently 1430.3 today, reflecting a -0.598% change since yesterday. Over the past week, the value of US dollar has remained relatively stable, with a -2.462% decrease compared to its value 7 days ago. During the past week, the exchange rate has fluctuated between a high of 1470.75 on 22-01-2026 and a low of 1423.25 on 28-01-2026.

sp500_outlook: Kevin Warsh Fed Chair 지명 후 금리 경로 불확실성
